title: Street Fighter 6/Version/1.03 - SuperCombo Wiki
content_text: Version 1.03 Game Version 1.03 date December 1, 2023 Summary Costume 3 release. Minor bug fixes. Links Patch Notes Costume 3 Patch Costume 3 released for the original 18 characters Universal Changes Wakeup Input Buffer Increased 4f → 7f Fixed an issue related to buffered inputs that occur immediately after the screen freeze of the opponent's Super Art Perfect Parry Fixed issue where certain actions would shorten the invincibility window on a successful Perfect Parry Assist Combos (Modern) Fixed issue that caused the start of the input buffer to occur 1 frame later than intended Also fixes issue where Chun-Li and Kimberly could not perform a jump cancel during Assist Combos if a button was input on the same frame Taunts Can no longer kara-cancel a special move into a taunt (e.g. PPP~KKK on consecutive frames) Key Character Changes A.K.I. 2HK No longer hits low on active frames 2-5 Chi Wen (6HP) Fixed issue where recovery was 1 frame longer on Perfect Parry LP Serpent Lash (236LP) Fixed issue where recovery was 6 frames longer on Perfect Parry OD Cruel Fate (214KK) Fixed issue where command inputs would swap directions immediately after jumping over the opponent Modern Controls: MP Serpent Lash (236M): Fixed issue where inputting Down after a successful command input would prevent the move from coming out MK Snake Step (5S): Fixed issue where this move would be performed with more shortcut commands besides 5S OD Snake Step (A[5S]): After regular/OD Nightshade Pulse, the dash no longer comes out while holding any Back/Down/Forward direction Allows A.K.I. to input Modern shortcut moves during the projectile recovery without buffering an accidental OD Snake Step Blanka 5HP Fixed issue where recovery was 5 frames longer on Parry / Perfect Parry / Armor absorb Rock Crusher (6MP) When the opponent is in Burnout, opponent's Drive Gain on Block adjusted 1250,1250 → 1250,625 Only applies when both hits connect; 2nd hit only builds 1250 Drive gauge for opponent on block during Burnout SA2 (214214P) Fixed issue where Drive Gauge recovery was different while the install timer was active On Ground, Drive Regen per Frame: 50 → 40 Airborne + Burnout, Drive Regen per Frame: 10 → 20 SA2 Install Bug Fixes 5LK / 2LP: fixed issue where front hurtbox during startup was vulnerable to the opponent's cross-up attacks 5MK / 5HP: fixed issue where the special cancel buffer timing was earlier than usual 2MP: fixed issue where foot hurtbox was smaller than usual j.MP: fixed issue where collision box would not expand on hit [4]6PP / [2]8K/KK: fixed issue where the input buffer for Rolling Cannon follow-ups did not work [4]6HP: fixed issue where bounce-back distance was shorter on Perfect Parry 63214KK: fixed issue where the first hit's active frames were 2 frames shorter than usual Chun-Li j.MP Fixed issue where active frames 3-4 of the first hit were not considered an Overhead Lotus Fist (214P~HP) When the opponent is in Burnout, opponent's Drive Gain on Block for 2nd hit only adjusted 1250 → 2500 No change when both hits are blocked (2500,1250) Dee Jay Speedy Maracas (22PP) Fixed issue where plinking the button input (e.g. 22P~P) caused the move to be recognized as a canceled activation even while holding the buttons Fixed issue where the move would not end upon button release with under 1 bar of Super gauge Modern Controls: fixed issue where the move could not be performed when plinking the buttons as 22M~H Modern Controls: fixed issue where a different button was required to continue the Held version depending on the amount of Super gauge stocked E. Honda Modern Controls: SA2 ([4]HS) fixed issue where the charge time was 5 frames longer when using the shortcut Guile SA2 (214214P) Fixed issue where Drive Gauge recovery was different while the install timer was active On Ground, Drive Regen per Frame: 50 → 40 Airborne + Burnout, Drive Regen per Frame: 10 → 20 Jamie Tensei Kick (2KK) Can no longer be kara-canceled into Taunt on the first startup frame JP Air Throw (j.LPLK) Fixed issue where JP would not have a Forced Knockdown or Punish Counter property applied when performed after a Departure: Window teleport Bylina (6HK) Fixed issue where the attack could not be canceled if the 2nd attack was blocked crouching Embrace (214K/KK) Fixed issue where the throw would not hit an opponent facing backwards Juri SA2 (214214P) Fixed issue where Drive Gauge recovery was different while the install timer was active On Ground, Drive Regen per Frame: 50 → 40 Airborne + Burnout, Drive Regen per Frame: 10 → 20 Marisa SA2 (214214P) Fixed issue where the startup was 1 frame faster when the button was released at a specific timing Rashid SA2 (214214K) Fixed issue where if you performed an enhanced special move using the final Air Current, you could not use another enhanced special afterwards Fixed issue where if you kicked the tornado at its final state with Arabian Cyclone, it would move the same speed as before it was kicked Ryu Collarbone Breaker (6MP) When the opponent is in Burnout, opponent's Drive Gain on Block for 2nd hit only adjusted 625 → 1250 No change when both hits are blocked (1250,625)

lists.text: Wakeup Input Buffer Increased 4f → 7f Fixed an issue related to buffered inputs that occur immediately after the screen freeze of the opponent's Super Art Perfect Parry Fixed issue where certain actions would shorten the invincibility window on a successful Perfect Parry Assist Combos (Modern) Fixed issue that caused the start of the input buffer to occur 1 frame later than intended Also fixes issue where Chun-Li and Kimberly could not perform a jump cancel during Assist Combos if a button was input on the same frame Taunts Can no longer kara-cancel a special move into a taunt (e.g. PPP~KKK on consecutive frames)

items.text: Wakeup Input Buffer Increased 4f → 7f Fixed an issue related to buffered inputs that occur immediately after the screen freeze of the opponent's Super Art
items.html:
Wakeup Input Buffer
  • Increased 4f → 7f
  • Fixed an issue related to buffered inputs that occur immediately after the screen freeze of the opponent's Super Art

items.text: Perfect Parry Fixed issue where certain actions would shorten the invincibility window on a successful Perfect Parry
items.html:
Perfect Parry
  • Fixed issue where certain actions would shorten the invincibility window on a successful Perfect Parry

items.text: Assist Combos (Modern) Fixed issue that caused the start of the input buffer to occur 1 frame later than intended Also fixes issue where Chun-Li and Kimberly could not perform a jump cancel during Assist Combos if a button was input on the same frame
items.html:
Assist Combos (Modern)
  • Fixed issue that caused the start of the input buffer to occur 1 frame later than intended
  • Also fixes issue where Chun-Li and Kimberly could not perform a jump cancel during Assist Combos if a button was input on the same frame

items.text: Taunts Can no longer kara-cancel a special move into a taunt (e.g. PPP~KKK on consecutive frames)
items.html:
Taunts
  • Can no longer kara-cancel a special move into a taunt (e.g. PPP~KKK on consecutive frames)

lists.text: 2HK No longer hits low on active frames 2-5 Chi Wen (6HP) Fixed issue where recovery was 1 frame longer on Perfect Parry LP Serpent Lash (236LP) Fixed issue where recovery was 6 frames longer on Perfect Parry OD Cruel Fate (214KK) Fixed issue where command inputs would swap directions immediately after jumping over the opponent Modern Controls: MP Serpent Lash (236M): Fixed issue where inputting Down after a successful command input would prevent the move from coming out MK Snake Step (5S): Fixed issue where this move would be performed with more shortcut commands besides 5S OD Snake Step (A[5S]): After regular/OD Nightshade Pulse, the dash no longer comes out while holding any Back/Down/Forward direction Allows A.K.I. to input Modern shortcut moves during the projectile recovery without buffering an accidental OD Snake Step

OD Cruel Fate (214KK)
  • Fixed issue where command inputs would swap directions immediately after jumping over the opponent

items.text: Modern Controls: MP Serpent Lash (236M): Fixed issue where inputting Down after a successful command input would prevent the move from coming out MK Snake Step (5S): Fixed issue where this move would be performed with more shortcut commands besides 5S OD Snake Step (A[5S]): After regular/OD Nightshade Pulse, the dash no longer comes out while holding any Back/Down/Forward direction Allows A.K.I. to input Modern shortcut moves during the projectile recovery without buffering an accidental OD Snake Step
items.html:
Modern Controls:
  • MP Serpent Lash (236M): Fixed issue where inputting Down after a successful command input would prevent the move from coming out
  • MK Snake Step (5S): Fixed issue where this move would be performed with more shortcut commands besides 5S
  • OD Snake Step (A[5S]): After regular/OD Nightshade Pulse, the dash no longer comes out while holding any Back/Down/Forward direction
    • Allows A.K.I. to input Modern shortcut moves during the projectile recovery without buffering an accidental OD Snake Step

items.text: Rock Crusher (6MP) When the opponent is in Burnout, opponent's Drive Gain on Block adjusted 1250,1250 → 1250,625 Only applies when both hits connect; 2nd hit only builds 1250 Drive gauge for opponent on block during Burnout
items.html:
Rock Crusher (6MP)
  • When the opponent is in Burnout, opponent's Drive Gain on Block adjusted 1250,1250 → 1250,625
  • Only applies when both hits connect; 2nd hit only builds 1250 Drive gauge for opponent on block during Burnout

items.text: SA2 (214214P) Fixed issue where Drive Gauge recovery was different while the install timer was active On Ground, Drive Regen per Frame: 50 → 40 Airborne + Burnout, Drive Regen per Frame: 10 → 20
items.html:
SA2 (214214P)
  • Fixed issue where Drive Gauge recovery was different while the install timer was active
  • On Ground, Drive Regen per Frame: 50 → 40
  • Airborne + Burnout, Drive Regen per Frame: 10 → 20

items.text: SA2 Install Bug Fixes 5LK / 2LP: fixed issue where front hurtbox during startup was vulnerable to the opponent's cross-up attacks 5MK / 5HP: fixed issue where the special cancel buffer timing was earlier than usual 2MP: fixed issue where foot hurtbox was smaller than usual j.MP: fixed issue where collision box would not expand on hit [4]6PP / [2]8K/KK: fixed issue where the input buffer for Rolling Cannon follow-ups did not work [4]6HP: fixed issue where bounce-back distance was shorter on Perfect Parry 63214KK: fixed issue where the first hit's active frames were 2 frames shorter than usual
items.html:
SA2 Install Bug Fixes
  • 5LK / 2LP: fixed issue where front hurtbox during startup was vulnerable to the opponent's cross-up attacks
  • 5MK / 5HP: fixed issue where the special cancel buffer timing was earlier than usual
  • 2MP: fixed issue where foot hurtbox was smaller than usual
  • j.MP: fixed issue where collision box would not expand on hit
  • [4]6PP / [2]8K/KK: fixed issue where the input buffer for Rolling Cannon follow-ups did not work
  • [4]6HP: fixed issue where bounce-back distance was shorter on Perfect Parry
  • 63214KK: fixed issue where the first hit's active frames were 2 frames shorter than usual

lists.text: Speedy Maracas (22PP) Fixed issue where plinking the button input (e.g. 22P~P) caused the move to be recognized as a canceled activation even while holding the buttons Fixed issue where the move would not end upon button release with under 1 bar of Super gauge Modern Controls: fixed issue where the move could not be performed when plinking the buttons as 22M~H Modern Controls: fixed issue where a different button was required to continue the Held version depending on the amount of Super gauge stocked

items.text: Speedy Maracas (22PP) Fixed issue where plinking the button input (e.g. 22P~P) caused the move to be recognized as a canceled activation even while holding the buttons Fixed issue where the move would not end upon button release with under 1 bar of Super gauge Modern Controls: fixed issue where the move could not be performed when plinking the buttons as 22M~H Modern Controls: fixed issue where a different button was required to continue the Held version depending on the amount of Super gauge stocked
items.html:
Speedy Maracas (22PP)
  • Fixed issue where plinking the button input (e.g. 22P~P) caused the move to be recognized as a canceled activation even while holding the buttons
  • Fixed issue where the move would not end upon button release with under 1 bar of Super gauge
  • Modern Controls: fixed issue where the move could not be performed when plinking the buttons as 22M~H
  • Modern Controls: fixed issue where a different button was required to continue the Held version depending on the amount of Super gauge stocked
